donat: I'm not a professional developer and this is a private project, the development takes place in my spare time, if you want to support this you can thank me with a donation under PayPal. You are also welcome to send me feature requests for future versions of the adapter.
getvito: Query data points from the VITO.XML:
ip desc: IP address on which VCONTROLD is running:
name: Surname
port desc: Port address via which VCONTROLD can be reached (default: 3002):
reconnect: Select reconnect time in min (nothing for no reconnect):
setvito: Setting data points from the VITO.XML:
states_only: Only create values that you use
